## Best YouTube Channels

Here are 5 top YouTube channels that frequently cover NCERT Class 10 Science, including the "Carbon and its Compounds" chapter:

*   **Vedantu Class 9 & 10:** This channel offers comprehensive explanations, masterclasses, and problem-solving sessions for various subjects, including Chemistry.
*   **Aura Classes:** Known for clear and concise explanations of complex science topics, Aura Classes provides detailed videos suitable for NCERT curriculum.
*   **Physics Wallah - NCERT:** This channel, by Alakh Pandey, focuses on delivering high-quality NCERT-based content across different science subjects with engaging teaching styles.
*   **Learn and Discover:** This channel specializes in breaking down scientific concepts into easily understandable segments with good visuals.
*   **Toppr Classes:** Toppr Classes provides a wide range of educational videos aligned with the NCERT syllabus, covering all aspects of Class 10 Science.
